component_details.name: BeaconKit
component_details.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

asset_details.name: Private Key
asset_details.description: Cryptographic key used to access and control assets in a wallet.

behavior_details.name: Trade Tokens
behavior_details.description: External User trades tokens on a Centralized Exchange.

data_flow_details.description: User withdraws tokens from a centralized exchange to their wallet.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Reward Vault contract may handle numerous small deposits inefficiently.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Inefficient deposit handling could increase costs or impact vault responsiveness.

assumptions: The Reward Vault contract does not efficiently handle a large number of small deposit transactions.

mitigation.strategy: Optimize deposit function, implement minimum deposit amount or batch processing.

description: An attacker performs a large number of small deposit transactions into a Reward Vault to consume excessive gas or computational resources, potentially disrupting service for other users.

component_details.name: BeaconKit
component_details.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Burn HONEY
behavior_details.description: External User burns $HONEY to redeem collateral assets on Honey Swap.

data_flow_details.description: Honey Swap sends minted $HONEY or vault shares to the user wallet.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Reward Vault contract incorrectly calculates or verifies BGT entitlements.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to claim BGT rewards.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Exploiting entitlement calculation directly affects the integrity of BGT distribution.

assumptions: The Reward Vault contract has a vulnerability in its BGT entitlement calculation or claim verification logic.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous smart contract audits focused on reward calculation and claim logic.

description: An attacker exploits a flaw in the Reward Vault contract's logic to claim more BGT rewards than legitimately earned.

component_details.name: BeaconKit
component_details.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Burn HONEY
behavior_details.description: External User burns $HONEY to redeem collateral assets on Honey Swap.

data_flow_details.description: Honey Swap sends minted $HONEY or vault shares to the user wallet.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Reward Vault contract's claim function is inefficient under high load.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to claim BGT rewards.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Inefficient claim handling could impact usability and increase costs for users.

assumptions: The Reward Vault contract's claim function is susceptible to resource exhaustion from high transaction volume.

mitigation.strategy: Optimize claim function gas consumption, implement rate limiting or batch claims if feasible.

description: An attacker floods the Reward Vault contract with claim transactions, potentially increasing gas costs or temporarily preventing legitimate users from claiming their BGT.

component_details.name: BeaconKit
component_details.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

asset_details.name: Private Key
asset_details.description: Cryptographic key used to access and control assets in a wallet.

behavior_details.name: Stake Assets
behavior_details.description: External User stakes PoL-eligible assets in a Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: User stakes PoL-eligible tokens in a Reward Vault.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Reward Vault contract incorrectly tracks staked LP token balances or verifies withdrawal requests.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to withdraw LP tokens.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Exploiting withdrawal logic directly affects the integrity of staked assets.

assumptions: The Reward Vault contract has a vulnerability in its staked balance tracking or withdrawal verification logic.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous smart contract audits focused on staking balance and withdrawal logic.

description: An attacker exploits a flaw in the Reward Vault contract's logic to withdraw more LP tokens than legitimately staked.

component_details.name: User Wallet
component_details.description: Software or hardware storing user private keys and interacting with the blockchain.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Withdraw Staked Assets
behavior_details.description: External User withdraws staked assets from a Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: BGT rewards available for claiming by the user from a Reward Vault.

boundary_details.name: Centralized Exchange to User Wallet
boundary_details.description: Separates the external centralized exchange from the user's local wallet.

security_gap.gap_description: BGT delegation contract or PoL mechanism incorrectly tracks delegated BGT or calculates boost.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to boost a validator.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Exploiting delegation or boost calculation affects core PoL mechanics and validator rewards.

assumptions: The BGT delegation contract or the PoL boost calculation logic contains vulnerabilities allowing manipulation of delegation amounts or boost percentages.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous smart contract audits focused on delegation and boost calculation logic.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BGT delegation contract or the PoL mechanism to tamper with their delegated amount or unfairly influence a validator's boost calculation.

component_details.name: User Wallet
component_details.description: Software or hardware storing user private keys and interacting with the blockchain.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Withdraw Staked Assets
behavior_details.description: External User withdraws staked assets from a Reward Vault.

data_flow_details.description: BGT rewards available for claiming by the user from a Reward Vault.

boundary_details.name: Centralized Exchange to User Wallet
boundary_details.description: Separates the external centralized exchange from the user's local wallet.

security_gap.gap_description: BGT delegation contract or boost calculation is inefficient under high load.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to boost a validator.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Inefficient delegation handling could impact usability and affect boost calculation stability.

assumptions: The BGT delegation contract or the PoL boost calculation logic is susceptible to resource exhaustion from high transaction volume or frequent updates.

mitigation.strategy: Optimize delegation update logic, implement rate limiting or cool-downs for delegation changes.

description: An attacker floods the delegation contract with frequent delegation updates (e.g., changing delegated validator or amount), potentially disrupting boost calculation or increasing costs.

component_details.name: Berachain Bridge
component_details.description: Canonical bridge powered by LayerZero for transferring assets between chains.

asset_details.name: Liquidity
asset_details.description: Tokens available in liquidity pools for trading.

behavior_details.name: View Info (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User views information on BeraHub (vaults, validators, etc.).

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Merkle proof verification flawed or proofs forgeable/reusable.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to claim incentives.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Compromised proof system allows theft of incentive tokens.

assumptions: An attacker can obtain, forge, or reuse a valid Merkle proof to claim incentives they are not entitled to.
The Merkle proof system relies on a potentially vulnerable backend service.

mitigation.strategy: Secure proof generation backend, audit Merkle proof verification for replay attacks and forgery, enforce proof expiration.

description: An attacker uses a forged, stolen, or reused Merkle proof to claim incentive tokens from the BGT Incentive Distributor contract, stealing rewards meant for legitimate users.

component_details.name: Berachain Bridge
component_details.description: Canonical bridge powered by LayerZero for transferring assets between chains.

asset_details.name: Liquidity
asset_details.description: Tokens available in liquidity pools for trading.

behavior_details.name: View Info (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User views information on BeraHub (vaults, validators, etc.).

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Merkle proof format or verification allows amount manipulation.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to claim incentives.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Manipulating claim amount directly affects integrity of incentive distribution.

assumptions: The Merkle proof structure does not securely bind the entitlement amount, or the verification logic doesn't properly check it.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure Merkle proof securely includes and validates the entitlement amount during verification.

description: An attacker modifies a legitimate Merkle proof to increase the amount of incentive tokens claimed from the BGT Incentive Distributor contract.

component_details.name: Berachain Bridge
component_details.description: Canonical bridge powered by LayerZero for transferring assets between chains.

asset_details.name: Liquidity
asset_details.description: Tokens available in liquidity pools for trading.

attack_surface.data_description: Claim transaction request or backend interaction.

behavior_details.name: View Info (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User views information on BeraHub (vaults, validators, etc.).

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

security_gap.gap_description: Backend service or contract vulnerable to claim-related DoS.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to claim incentives.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Disruption of the claiming process impacts user access to rewards.

assumptions: The backend service providing claim proofs is a single point of failure or susceptible to DoS.
The Distributor contract is vulnerable to overload from frequent or invalid claim attempts.

mitigation.strategy: Strengthen backend service resilience, implement rate limiting for claim requests and proof lookups.

description: An attacker targets the backend service providing claim proofs or floods the BGT Incentive Distributor contract, preventing legitimate users from claiming incentives.

component_details.name: CometBFT
component_details.description: General-purpose blockchain consensus engine used by BeaconKit.

asset_details.name: Voting Power
asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Claim Rewards (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User claims earned rewards (BGT, Incentives, Fees) via BeraHub.

data_flow_details.description: dApp fees available for claiming by the user from the FeeCollector.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Reward Vault
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator's reward allocation logic from the Reward Vault contract.

security_gap.gap_description: BGT Token contract burn function allows unauthorized burning or rate manipulation.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to burn BGT.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Exploiting burn function affects token supply and integrity.

assumptions: The BGT Token contract has a vulnerability in its burn function or access control, allowing unauthorized burns or modification of the 1:1 rate.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous smart contract audits focused on the burn function and access control.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BGT Token contract to either burn BGT belonging to other users or alter the 1:1 conversion rate to gain excess BERA.

component_details.name: CometBFT
component_details.description: General-purpose blockchain consensus engine used by BeaconKit.

asset_details.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

behavior_details.name: Claim Rewards (BeraHub)
behavior_details.description: External User claims earned rewards (BGT, Incentives, Fees) via BeraHub.

data_flow_details.description: dApp fees available for claiming by the user from the FeeCollector.

boundary_details.name: Validator to Reward Vault
boundary_details.description: Separates the validator's reward allocation logic from the Reward Vault contract.

security_gap.gap_description: BGT Token contract burn function is inefficient under high load.

actor_risk.description: A user attempting to burn BGT.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Disruption is limited to the burning process, less critical than core staking/claiming.

assumptions: The BGT Token contract's burn function is susceptible to resource exhaustion from high transaction volume.

mitigation.strategy: Optimize burn function gas consumption, implement rate limiting if feasible.

description: An attacker floods the BGT Token contract with burn transactions, potentially increasing gas costs or temporarily preventing legitimate users from burning BGT.
